evaluation_repair.failure: Initial held_out scoring stopped after all 21 screening checkpoints trained because an unseen production ID exceeded the frozen embedding vocabulary.
evaluation_repair.policy: Parse with an isolated codec, map model-facing unseen IDs to <unk>, persist production_oov_rate, and never mutate checkpoint vocabulary during evaluation.

evidence.checkpoint_disposition: local CPU scratch only; no promotion or bucket sync

conclusion.decision: Do not promote. Preserve as negative evidence; next work should address generation validity and held-out vocabulary coverage before spending on full HF-context training.
